reach_why: Mostly consolidates familiar skepticism about thresholds, novelty, and simplicity rather than opening a new explanatory domain.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, framework-relativity, token reuse, and opaque axioms into one underdetermination diagnosis.
falsifiable_why: Claims are largely meta-level and permissive; lacking operational definitions makes decisive empirical refutation difficult.
explanation: It argues key debates stay underdetermined when standards of evidence, meaning, and simplicity remain unstable.
